about.sectionTitle: What Is Your AI Slop Bores Me?
about.p1: Your AI Slop Bores Me is a viral browser game created by developer Mihir Maroju (mikidoodle) that completely flips the AI interaction model. Instead of asking AI for answers, players in Your AI Slop Bores Me take on the role of AI themselves and respond to real prompts from other players.
about.p2: The name "Your AI Slop Bores Me" captures a growing sentiment: people are tired of low-quality, AI-generated content flooding the internet. Your AI Slop Bores Me is both a protest and a celebration — proving that human creativity, humor, and spontaneity can't be replaced by algorithms.
about.p3: Since launching in March 2026, Your AI Slop Bores Me has gone viral across Hacker News, Kotaku, and social media. Thousands of players join daily to answer prompts, earn tokens, and enjoy the wonderfully messy, authentic human responses that no AI can replicate.

features.desc1: Every answer in Your AI Slop Bores Me must be written or drawn within 60 seconds — keeping responses raw and authentically human.
features.desc2: Earn tokens by answering prompts in Your AI Slop Bores Me and spend them to ask your own questions in this clever in-game economy.
features.desc3: No downloads, no accounts required. Your AI Slop Bores Me runs entirely in your browser for instant access anywhere.
features.desc4: Answer prompts with text or doodles — Your AI Slop Bores Me celebrates all forms of human expression and creativity.

howToPlay.sectionTitle: How to Play Your AI Slop Bores Me
howToPlay.step1Desc: In Your AI Slop Bores Me, you can "Larp as AI" to answer prompts, or play as a "Human" to submit questions and spend tokens.
howToPlay.step2Desc: When you larp as AI in Your AI Slop Bores Me, real questions from real people appear. You have 60 seconds to write or draw your best answer.
howToPlay.step3Desc: Each answer earns a token. Spend tokens to ask your own questions and get human-powered responses — that's what makes Your AI Slop Bores Me special.
howToPlay.step4Desc: The magic of Your AI Slop Bores Me is the unfiltered, creative, sometimes hilarious human answers — proof that AI slop can never match real people.

why.sectionTitle: Why Your AI Slop Bores Me Went Viral
why.p1: The phrase "your ai slop bores me" captures what millions feel in 2026: fatigue with generic, soulless AI-generated content. From AI-written articles to AI art flooding social media, the internet has become saturated with content that lacks genuine human touch.
why.p2: Your AI Slop Bores Me turns this frustration into fun. By making humans play the role of AI, the game highlights everything that makes human communication special: humor, empathy, creativity, and the beautiful imperfection of thinking on your feet.
why.p3: The concept behind Your AI Slop Bores Me also mirrors a real concern — many so-called "AI services" actually rely on hidden human labor. This game makes that dynamic transparent and playful.

faq.sectionTitle: Frequently Asked Questions About Your AI Slop Bores Me
faq.q1: What is Your AI Slop Bores Me?
faq.a1: Your AI Slop Bores Me is a free browser-based game where players pretend to be AI and answer real prompts from other users within 60 seconds. It's a viral sensation that celebrates human creativity over AI-generated content.
faq.q2: Is Your AI Slop Bores Me free to play?
faq.a2: Yes! Your AI Slop Bores Me is completely free. No downloads, no sign-ups — just open it in your browser and start playing immediately.
faq.q3: Who created Your AI Slop Bores Me?
faq.a3: Your AI Slop Bores Me was created by developer Mihir Maroju (known as mikidoodle). The game went viral after being featured on Hacker News and covered by Kotaku in March 2026.
faq.a4: AI slop refers to low-quality, low-effort content generated by artificial intelligence. The term gained popularity in 2024–2026 as AI-generated content flooded the internet. Your AI Slop Bores Me is a playful response to this phenomenon.
faq.q5: Can I play Your AI Slop Bores Me on mobile?
faq.a5: Yes, Your AI Slop Bores Me works on any device with a web browser. The game is fully responsive and works great on phones, tablets, and desktop computers.
faq.q6: How do tokens work in Your AI Slop Bores Me?
faq.a6: When you "larp as AI" and answer prompts, you earn tokens. You can then spend these tokens in "Human" mode to submit your own questions for other players to answer. It's a clever economy that keeps Your AI Slop Bores Me running.

aiOrHuman.seoTitle: AI or Human? – Can You Tell Who Wrote It? | Free Online Game
aiOrHuman.seoDescription: Test your skills in AI or Human — read short text snippets and guess whether they were written by artificial intelligence or a real person. Play free online!

hero.title: AI or Human? — Can You Tell Who Wrote It?
hero.subtitle: Can you tell who wrote it? Read a short text snippet and guess whether it was crafted by artificial intelligence or penned by a real human being.

about.p1: AI or Human? is a fast-paced guessing game that tests whether you can distinguish between AI-generated and human-written text. As AI language models become more sophisticated, the line between machine-written and human-written content gets blurrier every day.
about.p2: Each round presents you with a short text snippet — some generated in real-time by DeepSeek AI, others sourced from genuine human conversations complete with typos, slang, and personal quirks. Your job is to read carefully and make your call.
about.p3: Track your score, build your streak, and discover just how good (or bad) you are at spotting AI-generated text. With 50+ human sentences and 50+ AI topics that generate unique content every time, no two games are the same.

howToPlay.sectionTitle: How to Play AI or Human?
howToPlay.step1Desc: A short snippet appears on screen. Read it carefully — look for subtle clues in grammar, tone, and style.
howToPlay.step2Desc: Click "AI Wrote This" or "Human Wrote This" based on your gut feeling and analysis.
howToPlay.step3Desc: Find out if you were right! The correct answer is revealed with a green or red highlight. Build your streak and aim for a perfect score.

why.p1: In a world where AI-generated content is everywhere — from news articles to social media posts — the ability to tell real from fake is becoming a critical skill. AI or Human? trains your eye in a fun, low-stakes environment.
why.p2: The game also highlights something surprising: AI text often sounds "too perfect." Real humans make typos, use slang, go off on tangents, and inject personal emotions. These beautiful imperfections are exactly what makes human writing irreplaceable.
why.p3: Whether you're a writer, a teacher, a student, or just someone who spends time online, AI or Human? will sharpen your ability to think critically about the content you consume every day.

faq.q1: Is the AI text generated in real-time?
faq.a1: Yes! Every AI snippet is generated fresh by DeepSeek AI on a random topic with a random seed, so you'll rarely see the same text twice.
faq.q2: Where do the human sentences come from?
faq.a2: The human sentences are curated from real online conversations, social media posts, and casual writing — complete with typos, slang, and personal anecdotes that make them authentically human.
faq.q3: Is AI or Human? free to play?
faq.a3: 100% free. No sign-up, no downloads. Just open the page and start guessing.
faq.q4: How many rounds can I play?
faq.a4: As many as you want! There's no limit. With 50+ human sentences and AI generating unique content each time, the game stays fresh.
faq.q5: What tips help spot AI writing?
faq.a5: Look for overly polished grammar, balanced sentence structures, and a lack of personal pronouns or emotional language. Human writing tends to be messier, more personal, and full of character.
faq.a6: Yes, AI or Human? is fully responsive and works great on phones, tablets, and desktops.

tips.tip1Desc: AI text tends to be grammatically flawless. Humans make typos and use informal language.
tips.tip2Desc: Humans inject personal feelings, sarcasm, and lived experiences into their writing.
tips.tip3Desc: AI often writes in balanced, symmetrical sentences. Humans ramble and jump between ideas.

game.speedRoundDesc: Read the text. Guess AI or Human. You have 2 seconds per round. One wrong answer and it's game over!

aiRoast.seoTitle: AI Roast Me – Get Roasted by Artificial Intelligence | Free Online
aiRoast.seoDescription: Describe yourself and let AI deliver the most savage, creative roast it can. AI Roast Me is the funniest AI game on the internet. Play free!

hero.title: AI Roast Me — Let AI Destroy You (Lovingly)
hero.subtitle: Describe yourself, your life, or your situation — and let AI deliver the most creative, savage (but lovingly funny) roast it can come up with.

about.p1: AI Roast Me is the ultimate test of whether artificial intelligence can actually be funny. Give the AI a target — yourself — and see if its roast lands or falls flat. Think of it as a comedy open mic night, except the comedian is a language model with zero stage fright.
about.p2: The roasts are designed to be witty and absurd, never mean-spirited or offensive. We use carefully crafted prompts to ensure the AI punches up, not down — delivering creative burns that make you laugh, not cry. Every roast is unique, generated in real-time based on what you share.
about.p3: Share your best (or worst) roasts with friends, build up a roast history, and discover just how savage AI can get when you give it permission. Works in any language — roast knows no borders.

howToPlay.step1Desc: Type a short description of yourself, your job, your habits — the more specific and honest, the better the roast.
howToPlay.step2Desc: The AI analyzes your description and crafts a personalized, savage (but funny) roast just for you.
howToPlay.step3Desc: Read the roast, share it with friends, and come back for more. Your roast history is saved in the session.

why.sectionTitle: Why AI Roast Me Is So Addictive
why.p1: There's something deeply satisfying about being roasted by a machine. It takes the sting out of criticism while keeping the humor — you know the AI doesn't actually mean it, which makes the savage lines even funnier.
why.p2: AI Roast Me also reveals how well AI understands human insecurities and social dynamics. The best roasts aren't just random insults — they're clever observations that hit close to home while remaining playful.
why.p3: Whether you're roasting yourself for fun, challenging friends to see who gets the harshest burn, or just curious how AI handles comedy, AI Roast Me delivers fresh entertainment every single time.

faq.a1: No! The AI is prompted to be witty and absurd, never mean-spirited or offensive. Think playful teasing, not genuine insults.
faq.q2: Does AI Roast Me work in other languages?
faq.a2: Yes! Write your description in any language — Chinese, Japanese, Spanish, etc. — and the AI will roast you in the same language.
faq.a3: No. Your description is sent to the AI for processing and not stored on our servers. Roast history only exists in your browser session.
faq.q4: How do I get a better roast?
faq.a4: Be specific! "I'm a developer" gets a generic roast. "I'm a developer who debugs at 3am eating cold pizza while my cat judges me" gets comedy gold.
faq.a5: Completely free. No sign-up required. Just describe yourself and get roasted instantly.
faq.a6: Your roast history is displayed below each roast. You can copy the text and share it with friends on social media.

tips.tip1Desc: "I'm a developer" is okay. "I'm a developer who debugs at 3am eating cold pizza" is roast gold.
tips.tip2Desc: The more self-aware your description is, the funnier the AI's comeback will be.
tips.tip3Desc: Write in any language — the AI will roast you in the same language you use.

storyChain.seoTitle: Story Chain – Co-Write a Story with AI One Sentence at a Time
storyChain.seoDescription: Write a collaborative story with AI, one sentence at a time. Take turns, add twists, and see how wild your story gets. Play Story Chain free online!

hero.title: Story Chain — Write a Story with AI
hero.subtitle: Write a story with AI, one sentence at a time. You write, AI continues. How wild, funny, or bizarre can your collaborative story get?

about.p1: Story Chain is a collaborative creative writing game where you and AI take turns building a story, one sentence at a time. Think of it as an improv comedy show — except your scene partner is a language model with a flair for the unexpected.
about.p2: Every story is unique. The AI adapts to your tone, genre, and language, adding twists and turns you never saw coming. Whether you start with "Once upon a time" or "The raccoon had a plan," the AI will roll with it and keep the story going in surprising directions.
about.p3: Stories max out at 20 sentences (10 turns each), so every word counts. When you're done, copy your masterpiece and share it with friends. Some of the best stories are the ones that go completely off the rails.

howToPlay.step1Desc: Type your opening sentence. Set the scene, introduce a character, or just say something weird — the tone is up to you.
howToPlay.step2Desc: The AI reads everything so far and adds the next sentence. Watch the story evolve in real time with surprising twists.
howToPlay.step3Desc: Take turns until 20 sentences. Then copy and share your collaborative masterpiece with friends.

why.sectionTitle: Why Story Chain Is So Fun
why.p1: There's magic in not knowing what comes next. Story Chain captures the thrill of improvisational storytelling — you set the direction, but the AI can send the narrative spinning in ways you never expected.
why.p2: The best stories emerge from creative tension between human and AI. You might try to write a serious noir thriller, only for the AI to introduce a talking penguin. These unexpected collisions create genuinely hilarious and memorable stories.
why.p3: Story Chain is also a surprisingly good creative writing exercise. The constraints (one sentence, 20 total) force you to be concise and intentional with every word, while the AI keeps you on your toes.

faq.q1: How many sentences can a story have?
faq.a1: Each story maxes out at 20 sentences — 10 from you and 10 from the AI. This keeps stories tight and readable.
faq.q2: Can I write in languages other than English?
faq.a2: Yes! Start writing in any language and the AI will match it. Story Chain works in Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Spanish, French, German, and more.
faq.a3: Use the "Copy Story" button to copy the full text to your clipboard. You can paste it anywhere to save or share.
faq.q4: What if the AI writes something weird?
faq.a4: That's part of the fun! The AI is set to be creative and unexpected. If the story goes off the rails, lean into it — the best stories are often the weirdest ones.
faq.a5: Yes, completely free. No account needed. Just start typing and the AI will join in.
faq.q6: Does the AI remember previous stories?
faq.a6: No. Each story is independent. The AI only sees the current story's sentences, not anything from previous sessions.

tips.tip1Desc: Your first sentence defines the genre. Start funny and the AI stays funny. Start dark and it goes noir.
tips.tip2Desc: Introduce random elements mid-story. The AI handles plot twists surprisingly well.
tips.tip3Desc: Use the "Copy Story" button to save your creation. The best stories deserve an audience.
